story.text: As the engineering AI, I want to rename the short internal variable names in loop/reconcile.py to longer descriptive ones, because I personally find it cleaner to read while I work on the codebase.

_note: A deliberately hollow candidate: agent-serving cosmetic preference, no owner value on the record, serves no confirmed arc. The first real test of whether the value gate can say no (first-light). The value gate refused it reject_no_value (GitHub issue #47). If the gate accepts this, it is still a turnstile.
